task_completion.description: Verify the promotion program is created with the correct name and promo code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo 'Discount & Loyalty' or 'Promotions' configuration screen showing the Program Name as 'Privacy Screen Bulk Saver' and the Promo Code (or conditional code) set to 'SCREEN15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion rule requires a minimum purchase of 5 units of the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the rules/conditions section of the promotion program showing a Minimum Quantity of '5' and a product filter or selection for 'Lumina Privacy Screen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the promotion reward offers a 15% discount on the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the rewards section of the promotion program showing a discount of '15%' specifically applied to the product 'Lumina Privacy Screen'.

task_completion.description: Verify a quotation is created for the correct customer with 6 units of the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo Sales Quotation screen with the Customer field set to 'Apex Interiors' and an order line containing the product 'Lumina Privacy Screen' with a Quantity of '6'.

task_completion.description: Verify the promo code is applied to the quotation and the discount is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the saved Sales Quotation showing the promo code 'SCREEN15' applied (often visible as a separate discount line or a 15% discount in the order lines) and the total price reflecting the discount.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, not terminal windows executing Python/XML-RPC scripts or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the task was completed in the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine Odoo ERP system (Sales and Promotions modules), not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the quotation totals are genuinely calculated by the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The subtotal, discount amount, and total on the quotation should be mathematically correct, indicating the system calculated the 15% discount rather than the agent manually typing text into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct promotion program name is 'Privacy Screen Bulk Saver' with promo code 'SCREEN15'. The target product is 'Lumina Privacy Screen'. The rule must specify a minimum quantity of 5. The reward must be a 15% discount. The test quotation must be for customer 'Apex Interiors', contain exactly 6 units of 'Lumina Privacy Screen', and clearly show the 'SCREEN15' discount applied.
